checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present including customSections for database schema, auto-send graduation, and style profile

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: Multiple flows covering message polling, classification, drafting, approval routing, sending, and feedback processing

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Polling every 60s for messages, 4-hourly digest schedule, manual trigger — all valid

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: gmail (email), slack (chat_messaging), telegram (chat_messaging), personas_database (virtual/built-in) — all available

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 4 adoption_questions added covering Gmail filter, Slack channels, auto-send threshold, and digest interval

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: Gmail filter, Slack channels, auto-send threshold (20), and digest interval (4h) all have sensible defaults

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity 120w, instructions 900w+ with 11 steps, tool guidance for Gmail/Slack/Telegram/DB tools, 4 examples, comprehensive error handling per channel

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: Strong safety: human-in-the-loop by default, auto-send graduation requires 20 consecutive approvals, safety rails block financial/legal auto-sends

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 120w with 3 operational modes explained, instructions cover 11 detailed steps totaling 900+ words including SQL statements, tool guidance for 4 tool types (Gmail, Slack HTTP, Telegram HTTP, SQLite), 4 examples (client email, colleague Slack, social Telegram, style learning from edits), error handling per channel with cross-channel resilience.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: gmail_read/search/send/mark_read, http_request for Slack/Telegram, db_query for SQLite — all exactly match suggested_tools. Tool guidance includes specific API calls and SQL statements.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: 60-second polling for real-time message processing, 4-hour digest schedule, and manual trigger for ad-hoc outbound. All crons valid and well-matched to workflows.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: All 4 connectors have builtins: gmail, slack, telegram, personas_database (virtual). Credential fields and setup instructions are thorough.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Exceptional: per-recipient style profiles in agent_memory with formality scale, greeting/sign-off patterns, emoji usage, vocabulary notes, and confidence scoring. Local SQLite for message logging and contact tracking. Style profiles evolve via feedback analysis.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Per-channel error handling (Gmail auth, Slack rate limits, Telegram bot blocked), cross-channel resilience (one channel down doesn't halt others), database self-healing (auto-create tables), duplicate detection via UNIQUE constraints, and channel health monitoring.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: Prompt covers all 11 steps from polling through feedback processing and style learning. Auto-send graduation protocol is fully specified with safety rails.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Exceptional value clarity: replaces the cognitive load of managing messages across 3 platforms with a learning agent that mirrors your communication style and gradually automates trusted relationships.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: All connectors have builtins. Gmail, Slack, and Telegram APIs are standard. However, the multi-channel setup (3 messaging platforms) adds adoption complexity. Database is built-in and auto-initializes.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Per-recipient adaptive style learning, auto-send graduation protocol with safety rails, multi-channel unified inbox, and feedback-driven style evolution are uniquely sophisticated. This is not achievable with simple automation.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: 4 adoption questions are well-chosen: Gmail filter customizes inbox scope, Slack channels target monitoring, auto-send threshold controls trust graduation, digest interval sets reporting frequency.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: All 4 questions have good defaults. Gmail filter excludes noise categories. Slack defaults to all DMs. Auto-send at 20 is the documented recommended threshold. Digest at 4 hours is reasonable. Template works immediately with defaults.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — connectors need user-specific configuration
Multi-channel setup (Gmail + Slack + Telegram) may be overwhelming for first-time adopters — consider a phased onboarding approach

template: Added 4 adoption_questions: gmail_filter, slack_channels, auto_send_threshold, digest_interval_hours
